# octoflow-skills

Public mirror of OctoSync's Paperclip skills.

**This repo is auto-synced from `OctoflowOrg/octosync-paperclip` `config/paperclip/skills/` on every push to `main`. Do not edit directly — changes will be overwritten on the next sync.**

The mirror exists because Paperclip's GitHub skill importer only supports public repositories. The source-of-truth repo (`octosync-paperclip`) is private.

## Importing into Paperclip

In the Paperclip UI, paste the URL of the skill folder you want to install:

- `https://github.com/OctoflowOrg/octoflow-skills/tree/main/octosync-coordination-rules`
- `https://github.com/OctoflowOrg/octoflow-skills/tree/main/octosync-profile`
- `https://github.com/OctoflowOrg/octoflow-skills/tree/main/octosync-emails`
